title: The Only Skill That Can’t Be Automated
summary: David Ondrej presents a thesis about human capabilities that purportedly resist automation. The piece argues for the existence of a skill category that automation cannot replicate or replace, likely positioning adaptability, creativity, or critical thinking as fundamentally human.
